lines.hearsay: Fish came into {place}, and the room went quiet a moment.
lines.gossip: {B} paid {A} for the catch at {place} with {C} sitting three seats down, and {A} took the money slower than anyone needed — {C} did not look up, and the room noticed that more than if {C} had.
lines.report: {A} supplied fish to {B} at {place}; settled in coin, {C} present, slot {slot}.
